name: cairn
description: Live meeting transcription with speaker diarization

scripts.screenshot: npm run build && npx electron . --screenshot-mode=light && npx electron . --screenshot-mode=dark
scripts.install-app: npm run package && rm -rf /Applications/Cairn.app && ln -s "$(pwd)/dist-app/mac-arm64/Cairn.app" /Applications/Cairn.app && xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine /Applications/Cairn.app 2>/dev/null || true && echo 'Cairn linked at /Applications/Cairn.app -> dist-app/mac-arm64/Cairn.app'

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Cairn captures audio from Microsoft Teams calls and your microphone for live transcription on your local fleet.
extendInfo.NSCameraUsageDescription: Cairn does not use the camera.
